name: Computer Science & Software Engineering
description: You know how software breaks — memory leaks, race conditions, systems failing at 3am. AI systems fail in all those ways plus entirely new ones. Your engineering discipline is the foundation everything else builds on.
trajectory: Building reliable systems and debugging failures maps directly to AI robustness and reliability engineering.
Testing, verification, and code review skills translate to AI evaluation and red-teaming.
Production engineering and incident response connects to AI monitoring and deployment safety.
The field needs engineers who can build the reliable infrastructure that safety research runs on.

projects.title: Map AI failure modes to software bugs
projects.description: Read about AI failure modes (reward hacking, goal misgeneralisation, jailbreaking) and map them to software engineering concepts you already understand.

projects.title: Review AI safety tooling
projects.description: Evaluate open-source AI safety tools from an engineering perspective. What would you improve for reliability and usability?

projects.title: Contribute to safety infrastructure
projects.description: Contribute to open-source AI safety tooling — the field's infrastructure desperately needs experienced engineers.
